Author: Ajita Gupta
Title: Codex: AI-Assisted Coding for Absolute Beginners
Text:
Member-only story
Codex: AI-Assisted Coding for Absolute Beginners
How complete beginners can use AI to write better code, starting today
Using Codex Inside VS Code (With a Very Simple Example)
If you are new to programming, modern code editors can already feel overwhelming.
Now add “AI-assisted coding” on top — and it’s easy to think:
“This is probably not for me yet.”
The good news: AI-assisted coding is actually one of the easiest ways to learn, if it’s introduced gently.
This article shows, step by step:
- what Codex is,
- how it works inside VS Code,
- and how to use it on a very small, real example.
No shortcuts. No advanced tricks. Just one calm workflow.
What Is AI-Assisted Coding?
AI-assisted coding means:
You describe what you want in simple words,
and the AI helps you write or improve code.
You stay in control.
You always review the result.
Nothing changes automatically without your approval.
